LanguageData.Sylvie_WasPetted.stages.0.label: was gently petted
LanguageData.Sylvie_WasPetted.stages.0.description: Someone gently petted me. I feel cared for and accepted, and my heart is filled with warmth.
LanguageData.Sylvie_PettedSomeone.stages.0.label: petted Sylvie
LanguageData.Sylvie_PettedSomeone.stages.0.descriptio: Sylvie came to me asking to be petted. She looked like she needed affection so much, and it felt warm to be able to comfort her.
LanguageData.Sylvie_PettedSomeone.stages.1.label: petted Sylvie (close)
LanguageData.Sylvie_PettedSomeone.stages.1.descriptio: Sylvie trusted me enough to let me pet her. We have a special bond. Taking care of her makes me feel happy.
LanguageData.Sylvie_PettedMe_Social.stages.0.label: petted Sylvie
LanguageData.Sylvie_WasPetted_Social.stages.0.label: was gently petted
